name: Prociutto and Melon
recipeInstructions:
1. Scoop out the melon into bite-sized balls.
2. Sprinkle each melon ball with a small amount of lime juice.
3. Allow the seasoned melon balls to stand at room temperature for 10-30 minutes.
4. Cut the prosciutto into thin strips.
5. Wrap each melon ball in a strip of prosciutto.
6. Secure the prosciutto-wrapped melon with a toothpick.
7. Serve slightly chilled.
